title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SUMILE, BUTUAN CITY TO BE KNOWN AS SUMILE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
h. No. 4190 / 97 OG No. 30, 4414 (July 23, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9061, April 04, 2001 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SUMILE, BUTUAN CITY TO BE KNOWN AS SUMILE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established a national high school in Barangay Sumile, Butuan City to be known as the Sumile National High School.

SEC. 2. The Department of Education, Culture and Sports shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 3. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

AQUILINO Q. PIMENTEL, JR.

(Sgd.) FELICIANO BELMONTE

, JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the

House of Representatives

This

Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 16, 2000 and

February 5, 2001, respectively.

(Sgd.)

LUTGARDO B. BARBO

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 04, 2001

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
